message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects, each for question 1,2,3. Provide feedback and compliance boolean.

We need to evaluate the given text: It's a final section of thesis introduction. Questions: 1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? 2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? 3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text?

We examine the text. It contains "Problēmas nostādne:" and "Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums". It doesn't list chapters. So question 1: No. Feedback: text does not list main sections. compliance false.

Question 2: Does it briefly describe contents of each section? It doesn't describe sections; it just gives problem statement and justification. So no. compliance false.

Question 3: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure? Not really; only two parts. So false.

Thus all false. Provide JSON array.

Make sure keys: "question": "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback. Provide compliance boolean.

Return array.
